decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay by utilizing cheap spells and creatures to deal damage quickly. It includes cards like Fiery Impulse, Reckless Rage, Monastery Swiftspear, and Soul-Scar Mage to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck also features cards like Academic Dispute and Stormchaser's Talent to provide card advantage and flexibility. With a mana base of lands like Shivan Reef and Spirebluff Canal, this UR Aggro deck aims to dominate the battlefield and overwhelm opponents with fast, efficient threats.

The deck focuses on using the Greasefang Parhelion combo to quickly overpower the opponent. By using cards like Fleeting Spirit and Monument to Endurance to quickly generate tokens, along with Iron-Shield Elf and Guardian of New Benalia to protect the combo pieces, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can establish a board presence. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push help to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while cards like Bitter Triumph and Vanishing Verse provide additional removal options. Overall, the deck is built to efficiently execute its game plan and overwhelm the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo pieces of Greasefang and Parhelion to generate powerful synergies and overwhelming advantage. It includes a mix of disruption, card draw, and removal to control the game until the combo can be successfully executed. The key strategy is to protect the key combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan, allowing the deck to quickly take control of the game and secure victory.

The control deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a key card to draw into powerful multicolor spells efficiently. The deck also includes a variety of ramp cards like Sylvan Caryatid and Fabled Passage to ensure the deck can cast its spells quickly. Leyline Binding is used to control the opponent's board while Lightning Helix provides both removal and life gain. With a diverse range of spells and efficient mana fixing, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and control the game until it can secure a victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing various combo pieces to generate advantage and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By using cards like Tinybones Joins Up and Carnage, Crimson Chaos to generate card advantage, Raffine, Scheming Seer to manipulate the top of the library, and Valki, God of Lies for disruption, the deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent with its powerful synergies. The inclusion of other combo pieces like The Meathook Massacre and Gwen Stacy further enhances the deck's ability to control the game and secure victory.

This control deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a card advantage engine, while also incorporating a variety of powerful multicolor spells to control the board and answer threats. The deck includes a companion in Yorion, Sky Nomad for additional value and consistency. With a mix of removal spells, ramp spells, and versatile threats like Omnath, Locus of Creation, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and grind out wins through powerful synergies and efficient card advantage. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's multicolor requirements and enable consistent access to all of its powerful spells.

The focus of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with efficient and powerful creatures. Utilizing cards like Bishop of Wings, Resplendent Angel, and Righteous Valkyrie, the deck aims to gain life, create angel tokens, and buff its creatures to deliver a fast and aggressive game plan. With support from cards like Llanowar Elves and Collected Company, the deck can consistently put pressure on the opponent and maintain a strong board presence throughout the game.

This UR Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with low-cost aggressive creatures and burn spells. It utilizes prowess triggers from cards like Soul-Scar Mage and Monastery Swiftspear to deal consistent damage while clearing the way with removal spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage. The deck also includes some tempo plays such as Boomerang Basics and Academic Dispute to disrupt opponents' game plan. By applying pressure early and efficiently managing resources, this deck can quickly close out games before opponents can stabilize.

The main objective of this deck is to aggressively attack the opponent with quick and efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while also dealing direct damage with spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Strike. The deck aims to maintain a high level of pressure on the opponent through a combination of creatures and burn spells, ultimately overwhelming them before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Monstrous Rage and Reckless Rage also allows for additional damage output and removal options to keep the opponent on the defensive.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's hand with cards like Duress and Thoughtseize, while also efficiently removing threats on the board with Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay. The deck also aims to establish a strong board presence with creatures like Llanowar Elves and Sentinel of the Nameless City. Additionally, the deck utilizes powerful enchantments like Unholy Annex and Culling Ritual to further control the pace of the game and out value the opponent. The inclusion of Sheoldred, the Apocalypse provides a powerful late-game threat to close out the game.

This deck focuses on aggressive play using creatures like Bloodtithe Harvester, Preacher of the Schism, and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes disruption cards like Duress and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's hand and removal spells like Fatal Push and Go for the Throat to deal with threats on the board. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption, utilizing the Rakdos color combination to its fullest potential.

This deck focuses on utilizing Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a powerful control finisher, with a diverse range of spells and lands to support its effectiveness. The inclusion of Leyline Binding and various versatile removal spells allows for disruption of the opponent's strategy while generating card advantage through Niv-Mizzet's ability. The deck also includes ramp elements such as Sylvan Caryatid and Omnath, Locus of Creation to accelerate its game plan. By leveraging a mix of powerful multicolor spells and lands, the deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent in a Pioneer 1 vs 1 setting.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It aims to deal damage as efficiently as possible, using cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage to chip away at the opponent's life total. With a mix of cheap creatures and powerful burn spells, the deck can apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game. By keeping the pressure on and forcing the opponent to react to threats, this deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This combo deck focuses on assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo to generate a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck utilizes cards like Bitter Triumph and Thoughtseize to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By efficiently ramping and creating tokens with cards like Esika's Chariot and Formidable Speaker, the deck aims to quickly bring out key combo pieces like Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II. The deck also includes utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Multiversal Passage to ensure consistency and versatility in executing the combo.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive creature plays with cards like Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves to ramp up mana quickly. Collected Company allows for additional creature summons, while Skyclave Apparition and Archon of Emeria provide disruption for the opponent's strategy. Thalia, Guardian of Thraben slows down opponents with noncreature spells, allowing for a faster tempo. The deck also includes cards like Elspeth, Storm Slayer and Aven Interrupter for additional control and removal options to maintain board advantage. The overall strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures while controlling the board.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal, disruption and powerful creatures to control the game and outvalue the opponent. The main goal is to efficiently remove threats with cards like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay, while using cards like Preacher of the Schism and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to generate card advantage and pressure the opponent. The deck also includes hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By effectively managing resources and disrupting the opponent, this deck aims to grind out victories through attrition and value.
